creation_query.query:
-- Version Control
-- (2025-09-11) - Erald change currently_active_this_day from WHEN DATE(resigned_jkt_date) = day OR DATE(terminated_jkt_date) = day 
-- -------------- to WHEN DATE(resigned_jkt_date) > day OR DATE(terminated_jkt_date) > day
-- (2025-11-14) - Amalia Change logic to OR to AND in witdraw join 
-- (2025-12-09) - Added is_last_day_of_month and is_last_day_of_week flag

CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE
  `ledger-fcc1e.merchant_success_analytics.ms_daily_status_log`
PARTITION BY day
  AS 


WITH base_data AS (
  SELECT
    candidate_name,
    phone_number,
    area_placement,
    district_coverage,
    vendor_name,
    vendor_type,
    role_type,
    prospero_email,
    CASE WHEN LOWER(vendor_name) LIKE "%permanen%" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END is_permanent,
    start_date_ms_active,
    resigned_jkt_date,
    terminated_jkt_date,
    reason_for_resignation_or_termination,
    reason_type_for_resignation_or_termination,
    COALESCE(resigned_jkt_date, terminated_jkt_date, CURRENT_DATE()) AS en

columns.description: URL link to candidate's CV document in Google Drive. Resume reference.
Geographic region where candidate is assigned/placed. Work location area.
Specific city or regency for placement. Detailed location.
District area covered by MSE/RSE assignment. Territory coverage.
Vendor or staffing company type. Vendor type classification for hiring source.
Phone number (10-11 digit Indonesian mobile). Primary identifier for merchant or contact lookup.
Email address. Contact information for communication.
Tfcode. Timeforce/HR system code for employee. HR system identifier.
Full name of job candidate. Candidate name for identification in hiring process.
Job role classification type. Role type defines position being hired.
Name used in reporting systems. Reporting identifier.
Current stage in MSE/RSE hiring pipeline. Shows where candidate is in process.
Timestamp when record was created in Jakarta timezone. Created at JKT timestamp marks record creation.
Created Jkt - Timestamp when record was created. Indicates when entity entered the system.
Unique identifier for external form response. Primary key or foreign key for data relationships.
Is currently active. Boolean flag indicating state or condition. Used for status or attribute tracking.
Date when MSE/RSE became active and started work. Employment start date.
Detailed notes from user/team lead interview. Assessment feedback.

Pulang malam - artaboga, Hari libur masuk, Tidak bisa bersaing bunga 3.5% di home credit sementara di BW juga bunga 3.5 - 4.5%.

- Aktif bertanya dan paham garis besar bisnis EDC.

columns.description: Assessment notes from credit evaluation team. Contains qualitative observations on borrower and business.
Cv submitted first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Cv submitted jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when CV was submitted by candidate. CV submission time.
Week when CV was first submitted. Submission week identifier.
Cv rejected first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Cv rejected jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when CV was rejected in screening. Rejection time.
Week when CV was first rejected. Rejection week identifier.
Binary flag (0/1) indicating whether AI interview was conducted. AI interview occurrence.
Ai interview jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp of AI assessment interview. Interview timestamp.
Week of AI assessment interview. Interview week.
Binary flag (0/1) indicating whether AI interview resulted in rejection. AI interview rejection.
Ai interview rejected jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Ai interview rejected interview jkt ts. Timestamp of AI rejection decision. Rejection timestamp.
Interview Rejected - Week identifier when AI assessment resulted in rejection. Tracks rejection timing.
Interview Scheduled - Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ta interview scheduled jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when team lead interview was scheduled. Scheduling time.
Week when TL interview was first scheduled. Scheduling week.
Interview Rejected - Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ta interview rejected jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Interview Rejected - Timestamp when rejected by team lead. Rejection time.
Ta interview rejected first jkt week. Week of team lead rejection. Rejection week.
Interview Not - Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ta interview not join jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when candidate failed to join TA interview in Jakarta timezone. TA interview no-show timestamp indicates candidate did not attend scheduled talent acquisition interview.
Week of first TA interview no-show. TA interview no-show first week marker.
Assessment assigned first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Assessment assigned jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when assessment was assigned. Assignment time.
Week when assessment was first assigned. Assignment week.
Assessment failed first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Assessment failed jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when assessment was failed. Failure time.
Week when assessment was failed. Failure week.
Binary flag (0/1) indicating whether assessment was not done. Assessment incomplete flag.
Assessment not doing jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when assessment was not started. Non-completion time.
Week when assessment was not done. Non-completion week.
Assessment passed first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Assessment passed jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when assessment was passed. Pass timestamp.
Week when assessment was passed. Pass week.
User interview scheduled first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
User interview scheduled jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when user interview was scheduled. Scheduling time.
Week when user interview was scheduled. Scheduling week.
User interview not join first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
User interview not join jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when candidate failed to join user/hiring manager interview in Jakarta timezone. User interview no-show timestamp tracks no-shows at interview stage.
Week of user interview no-show. No-show week.
User interview passed first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
User interview passed jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when user interview was passed. Pass time.
Week when user interview passed. Pass week.
User interview rejected first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
User interview rejected jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when rejected by user interview. Rejection time.
Week of user interview rejection. Rejection week.
Ojt scheduled first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ojt scheduled jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when OJT (on-the-job training) was scheduled. OJT scheduling time.
Week when OJT was scheduled. OJT scheduling week.
Ojt Progress - Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ojt Progress - Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when OJT started/was in progress. OJT start time.
Week when OJT was in progress. OJT progress week.
Binary flag (0/1) indicating whether OJT was not passed. OJT failure occurrence flag.
Ojt not passed jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when OJT was not passed. OJT failure time.
Week when OJT was first failed. OJT not passed week indicator.
Ojt not join first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ojt not join jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when candidate failed to join OJT (On-the-Job Training) in Jakarta timezone. OJT no-show join timestamp marks training attendance failure.
Week identifier when candidate no-showed OJT for the first time. Tracks absence.
Ojt passed first flag. Boolean flag (true/false or 1/0). Indicates presence, eligibility, or status.
Ojt passed jkt date. Date of event or action. Indicates when transaction or process occurred.
Timestamp when OJT was passed/completed in Jakarta. OJT passed completion timestamp.
Week when OJT was passed. OJT completion week.
Pkwt Created - Timestamp when record was created. Indicates when entity entered the system.
